SEARCH:
程序包 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox

类 NodeParticle

java.lang.Object
org.miv.pherd.Particle
org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.NodeParticle
直接已知子类:
LinLogNodeParticle, SpringBoxNodeParticle
public abstract class NodeParticle extends org.miv.pherd.Particle
Base implementation of a node particle to be used in the BarnesHutLayout to represent nodes and choose their positions.

Several abstract methods have to be overrided to provide a computation of the layout (all the attraction/repulsion computation is done in this class):

  • attraction(Vector3)
  • repulsionN2(Vector3)
  • repulsionNLogN(Vector3)

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    double
    attE
    Attraction energy for this node only.
    Vector3
    disp
    Displacement vector.
    boolean
    frozen
    Should the node move?.
    double
    len
    Last computed displacement vector length.
    ArrayList<EdgeSpring>
    neighbours
    Set of edge connected to this node.
    PrintStream
    out
    If non null, all this node statistics will be output to this stream.
    double
    repE
    Repulsion energy for this node only.

    • neighbours

      public ArrayList<EdgeSpring> neighbours
      Set of edge connected to this node.

      Should the node move?.

      Attraction energy for this node only.

      Repulsion energy for this node only.

      public PrintStream out
      If non null, all this node statistics will be output to this stream.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • NodeParticle

      public NodeParticle(BarnesHutLayout box, String id)
      New node. The node is placed at random in the space of the simulation.
      参数:
      box - The spring box.
      id - The node identifier.

    • NodeParticle

      public NodeParticle(BarnesHutLayout box, String id, double x, double y, double z)
      New node at a given position.
      参数:
      box - The spring box.
      id - The node identifier.
      x - The abscissa.
      y - The ordinate.
      z - The depth.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getEdges

      public Collection<EdgeSpring> getEdges()
      All the edges connected to this node.
      返回:
      A set of edges.

    • move

      public void move(int time)

      move 在类中 org.miv.pherd.Particle

    • nextStep

      public void nextStep(int time)

    • moveOf

      public void moveOf(double dx, double dy, double dz)
      Force a node to move from a given vector.
      参数:
      dx - The x component.
      dy - The y component.
      dz - The z component.

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(double x, double y, double z)
      Force a node to move at a given position.
      参数:
      x - The new x.
      y - The new y.
      z - The new z.

    • registerEdge

      public void registerEdge(EdgeSpring e)
      The given edge is connected to this node.
      参数:
      e - The edge to connect.

    • unregisterEdge

      public void unregisterEdge(EdgeSpring e)
      The given edge is no more connected to this node.
      参数:
      e - THe edge to disconnect.

      public void removeNeighborEdges()
      Remove all edges connected to this node.
